calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Off Calendar

Notice And Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Jeffrey S. Conner, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, KENNY NG, sworn and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant YI HONG ZHENG,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $45,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $600.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $45,600.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
